name: octoally
description: AI coding session orchestration dashboard — launch, monitor, and manage Claude Code sessions from a web UI

scripts.build: npm run build:dashboard && npm run build:server
scripts.install:all: npm install && cd server && npm install && cd ../dashboard && npm install
scripts.clean: cd server && rm -rf dist && cd ../dashboard && rm -rf dist

author: AI Genius Automations <support@aigeniusautomations.com>
